description_long: This is an adult male figure with a lean build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a sleeveless tank top with a large number '7' printed on the front, paired with fitted jeans and sturdy lace-up boots. His facial features are stylized, with prominent ears and a short, neatly styled haircut. The figure's posture is upright and symmetrical, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a casual, athletic style. The surface of the figure appears smooth and matte, with visible texturing on the jeans and boots to simulate fabric and leather. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure is designed to represent a typical urban pedestrian.
description: A stylized adult male pedestrian in a tank top with the number '7', jeans, and boots, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has a casual, athletic appearance and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tank top with the number '7', facial features, and both arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the tank top and jeans, and the boots' side details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tank top, jeans, and the back of the head and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the clothing and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tank top and fitted jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
